microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end **product vision and roadmap** for Azure's resilience validation platform, scaling a 2-person operation into a self-service system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling features that reduced operational toil by 30% and unlocked scalable, high-velocity execution across enterprise customers.

Built and deployed an **AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring workflows using LLM-powered automation to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly applying generative AI to a high-stakes production system.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by rapidly prototyping the program, surfacing critical hardware defects, and establishing a new continuous validation model.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, translating complex technical constraints for non-technical stakeholders.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI product adoption** for code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training that grew utilization across 14 key Azure teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly — demonstrating hands-on fluency with LLM-powered developer tools.

Shaped the **product roadmap** to include intent-based YAML generation by running 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer insights into prioritized engineering requirements.

Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata and embedding standards, cutting lookup time by 83% — applying RAG and retrieval concepts to a real user-facing workflow.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, balancing data-driven decision-making with cross-functional stakeholder buy-in.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact investments and embed experimentation and data fluency into the core planning workflow.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the end-to-end strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and driving urgency across IT, Operations, and Engineering to hit launch targets.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process — demonstrating the hands-on, cross-functional execution Ramp's high-velocity teams require.

Drove alignment across three orgs to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and translating complex systems constraints into a clear, actionable roadmap for a technical audience.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal lifecycle for 200+ monthly quotes via a new CRM workflow, applying customer empathy and process thinking to directly improve a core business conversion funnel.

Executed a **data-driven go-to-market strategy** — optimizing the website, Google profile, and digital channels — reducing Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and lifting conversions by 2.7% through rapid iteration and measurable experimentation.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and deliver pricing model recommendations to leadership, demonstrating the financial and data fluency central to Ramp's spend management mission.
